summary: Tested new notification features for iteration 96. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Notification Preferences on Profile page, Daily Trade Summary admin page, Notify All Members button on Trade Monitor, Daily Summary button on Notifications page, Install App menu in sidebar dropdown. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints implemented correctly: GET/PUT /api/users/notification-preferences, GET /api/admin/daily-trade-summary, POST /api/admin/signals/force-notify
NotificationPreferences model includes both member and admin-specific notification types
DailyTradeSummaryPage correctly shows stats cards, signal info, and member lists (traded/missed/did_not_trade)
ProfilePage has Notification Preferences card with proper toggle switches for all notification types
TradeMonitorPage shows 'Notify All Members' button for Master Admin when signal is official
NotificationsPage has 'Daily Summary' button that navigates to /admin/daily-summary
Sidebar Install App menu item opens PWAInstallInstructions dialog with device-specific instructions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified new notification features. Key endpoints: /api/users/notification-preferences (GET/PUT), /api/admin/daily-trade-summary (GET with optional date param), /api/admin/signals/force-notify (POST, requires active signal). Frontend pages: ProfilePage has Notification Preferences card, DailyTradeSummaryPage at /admin/daily-summary shows trade stats, NotificationsPage has Daily Summary button for admins, TradeMonitorPage has Notify All Members button, Sidebar has Install App menu item in profile dropdown.

verified_features.details: Returns default preferences based on user role. Admin users get additional admin-specific preferences (member_trade_submitted, member_missed_trade, member_profit_report, daily_summary).
Saves preferences correctly and persists to database.
Returns date-based trade summary with traded/missed/did_not_trade arrays, stats (total_traded, total_missed, total_profit, total_commission), and signal info.
Returns 404 if no active signal, otherwise triggers email send and returns sent count.
Card with data-testid='notification-preferences-card' shows Trading Notifications section and Admin Notifications section (for admins). Toggle switches work correctly.
Page loads with stats cards (traded, missed, profit, commission) and member lists. Date picker allows viewing different dates.
Button with data-testid='go-to-daily-summary-btn' visible for admin users. Navigates to /admin/daily-summary.

verified_features.feature: Trade Monitor Notify All Members button
verified_features.details: Button with data-testid='force-notify-members-btn' visible on Active Signal card for Master Admin when signal is official.
Menu item with data-testid='install-app-menu-item' in profile dropdown. Opens PWAInstallInstructions dialog with device-specific instructions.
